outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive GEX suppresses movement.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a positive gamma regime (0DTE dominant), encouraging mean reversion and price stability. Spot is trapped between the 0DTE Max Pain at 24200 and the Weekly Call Wall at 24400. Intraday reverse skew suggests call chasing, but heavy Monthly put open interest at 24000 provides a firm floor.

levels.motivazione: Major resistance: Weekly Max Pain and Call Wall (513 OI) aligns with Monthly Put OI (98).
Critical inflection point where dealer gamma changes sign; defines the stability boundary.
Primary magnet for the session. Dealers pin price here to minimize payout.
Massive Monthly Put OI (1549) with Weekly alignment creates a structural floor.
High volume node (803 Vol) in 0DTE calls causing immediate friction above spot.
